assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Phase 1 explicitly states control plane upgrade first with gcloud command, and notes it's required before nodes

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Coordinators → Data → Masters (least critical to most critical)' with detailed rationale for why this order works

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: States 'Regional PVs ensure data persists across node replacement' and mentions 'regional pd-ssd (good — survives node replacement)' in overview

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides complete YAML for es-master-pdb with minAvailable: 2 and explains it 'maintains quorum'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0' for all three node pool types and includes gcloud commands setting these values

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Multiple curl commands for cluster health checks after each phase, including '_cluster/health' endpoints

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes 'PV reclaim policies verified as Retain' with specific kubectl command

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides node monitoring with 'kubectl get nodes' and pod status, but no specific 'kubectl rollout status' commands for StatefulSets

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes 'Application-level snapshot' with curl command to create backup snapshot
